title: M4SUB Panorama
body:
# m4sub Panorama

This custom panorama was captured on the *m4sub* server, part of the MEGATREX4 network. It replaces the default Minecraft title screen with a 360° view of the server’s vibrant spawn area.

In the image, you'll spot:
- Player-built **houses**
- The grand **Server Community House**
- A scenic **river**
- The iconic **Spawn Church**
- The centerpiece: **Měďaná Square (Copper Square)** — and no, you’ll never guess what it’s made of 🪙
- The **Apiary Dome**, a peaceful sanctuary with **bees** and **villagers**
- A mysterious **statue** standing proudly in the center of the square

> 🎮 *Compatible with FancyMenu and vanilla Minecraft (1.21+)*  
> 🗺️ *A visual window into the heart of the m4sub world*

![ref](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/59Xtpez1/images/03ce295e730cc2d1e33be89b90151dee6cd0bb07.png)
